reference: Dear sir, I can understand your concern. In my opinion, you need to check for serum C-peptide and insulin assay. It might be due to excess insulin secretion. I suggest you see an endocrinologist for further evaluation.
text: Here, sir, I can understand your concern. In my opinion, you need to check for serum, C-peptide, and insulin acid. It might be due to excess insulin secretion. I suggest you see endocrinologist for further evaluation.
